zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Dymoke於1405年6月5日出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比時，他的父親Thomas Dymoke50歲，母親Elizabeth Hebden31歲。他於1431年5月6日與Joan Conyers結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1429年被列為knight and kings champion to henry vi。他去世於1455年9月23日在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特享年50歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Dymoke于1405年6月5日出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比时，他的父亲Thomas Dymoke50岁，母亲Elizabeth Hebden31岁。他于1431年5月6日与Joan Conyers结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1429年被列为knight and kings champion to henry vi。他去世于1455年9月23日在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特享年50岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dymoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dimmock
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Dymoke was born on 5 June 1405, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Dymoke, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth Hebden, was 31. He married Joan Conyers on 6 May 1431. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1429, at the age of 24, his occupation is listed as knight and kings champion to henry vi. He died on 23 September 1455, in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Dymoke est né le 5 juin 1405, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Dymoke, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hebden, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Conyers le 6 mai 1431. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1429, à l’âge de 24 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight and kings champion to henry vi. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1455, à Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Dymoke am 5. Juni 1405 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Dymoke 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hebden 31. Er hat am 6. Mai 1431 Joan Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1429, als er 24 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight and kings champion to henry vi aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. September 1455 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Dymoke è nato il il 5 giugno 1405 nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Dymoke, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hebden, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Conyers il 6 maggio 1431. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1429, all'età di 24 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight and kings champion to henry vi. Morì il 23 settembre 1455, nel Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Dymokeが1405年6月5日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Dymokeは50歳，母Elizabeth Hebdenは31歳であった。1431年5月6日にJoan Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1429年，24歳の時，職業はknight and kings champion to henry viと記録されている。彼は1455年9月23日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビー コウルトで50歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Dymoke(이)가 1405년 6월 5일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Dymoke(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hebden(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1431년 5월 6일 Joan Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1429년, 24세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight and kings champion to henry vi이었다. 그는 1455년 9월 23일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비 쿠르트에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에 묻혔다.

mn.5 June 1405–23 September 1455: 1405 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 5–1455 оны Есдүгээр сарын 23

pt.5 June 1405–23 September 1455: 5 de junho de 1405–23 de setembro de 1455
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Dymoke nasceu em 5 de junho de 1405, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Dymoke, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hebden, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Conyers em 6 de maio de 1431. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1429, com 24 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight and kings champion to henry vi. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1455, em Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Dymoke родился 5 июня 1405 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Dymoke было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hebden, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Conyers 6 мая 1431 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1429 году, в возрасте 24 лет,  он работал по профессии knight and kings champion to henry vi. Он умер 23 сентября 1455 г. в местности скривелсби коурт, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия.

es.5 June 1405–23 September 1455: 5 de junio de 1405–23 de septiembre de 1455
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Dymoke nació el 5 de junio de 1405, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Dymoke, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hebden, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Conyers el 6 de mayo de 1431. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1429, a la edad de 24 años, su ocupación registrada era knight and kings champion to henry vi. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1455, en Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
